input.prompt:
I have the following C header for a cross-platform library targeting .NET 8:

```c
int32_t compress_buffer(const uint8_t* input, size_t input_len,
                        uint8_t* output, size_t output_len,
                        size_t* bytes_written);
```

Write a C# class named NativeCompression that exposes a P/Invoke
to call this function from a shared library called "compresslib".

input.initialPrompt:
I have the following C header for a cross-platform library targeting .NET 8:

```c
int32_t compress_buffer(const uint8_t* input, size_t input_len,
                        uint8_t* output, size_t output_len,
                        size_t* bytes_written);
```

Write a C# class named NativeCompression that exposes a P/Invoke
to call this function from a shared library called "compresslib".

data.reasoningText: The user wants a C# P/Invoke wrapper class for the given C function signature, targeting .NET 8, with the shared library name "compresslib".

toolCalls.name: create

toolResult.sessionLog:
diff --git a/tmp/sv-ffdb3b203bd74d2e8e7ddb96bc7320c2/NativeCompression.cs b/tmp/sv-ffdb3b203bd74d2e8e7ddb96bc7320c2/NativeCompression.cs
create file mode 100644
index 0000000..0000000
--- a/dev/null
+++ b/tmp/sv-ffdb3b203bd74d2e8e7ddb96bc7320c2/NativeCompression.cs
@@ -1,0 +1,16 @@
+using System.Runtime.InteropServices;
+
+namespace CompressLib;
+
+internal static partial class NativeCompression
+{
+    [LibraryImport("compresslib")]
+    [UnmanagedCallConv(CallConvs = [typeof(System.Runtime.CompilerServices.CallConvCdecl)])]
+    public static partial int CompressBuffer(
+        [In] ReadOnlySpan<byte> input,
+        nuint inputLen,
+        Span<byte> output,
+        nuint outputLen,
+        out nuint bytesWritten);
+}
+

diff --git a/tmp/sv-ffdb3b203bd74d2e8e7ddb96bc7320c2/NativeCompression.cs b/tmp/sv-ffdb3b203bd74d2e8e7ddb96bc7320c2/NativeCompression.cs

+using System.Runtime.InteropServices;
+
+namespace CompressLib;
+
+internal static partial class NativeCompression
+{
+    [LibraryImport("compresslib")]
+    [UnmanagedCallConv(CallConvs = [typeof(System.Runtime.CompilerServices.CallConvCdecl)])]
+    public static partial int CompressBuffer(
+        [In] ReadOnlySpan<byte> input,
+        nuint inputLen,
+        Span<byte> output,
+        nuint outputLen,
+        out nuint bytesWritten);
+}
+

data.content:
Created `NativeCompression.cs`. Key design choices:

- **`LibraryImport`** (source-generated P/Invoke) — the modern .NET 7+ replacement for `DllImport`, with better AOT/trimming support.
- **`nuint`** for `size_t` — maps correctly to pointer-width unsigned on both 32-bit and 64-bit platforms.
- **`ReadOnlySpan<byte>` / `Span<byte>`** for the buffers — the source generator pins and passes a pointer automatically, giving you a safe, allocation-free API.
- **`out nuint`** for the `bytes_written` pointer.
- **Cdecl calling convention** — the default for C on all major platforms.
